creator: danmcgrath.ca@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

It seems that the pre-install script failed during update on installation of security/vault 1.6.1:

#> pkg install vault
Updating poudriere repository catalogue...
poudriere repository is up to date.
All repositories are up to date.
The following 1 package(s) will be affected (of 0 checked):

New packages to be INSTALLED:
        vault: 1.6.1

Number of packages to be installed: 1

The process will require 148 MiB more space.
49 MiB to be downloaded.

Proceed with this action? [y/N]: y
[1/1] Fetching vault-1.6.1.txz: 100%   49 MiB  10.2MB/s    00:05    
Checking integrity... done (0 conflicting)
[1/1] Installing vault-1.6.1...
===> Creating groups.
Creating group 'vault' with gid '471'.
===> Creating users
Creating user 'vault' with uid '471'.
pw: user 'vault' disappeared during update
pkg: PRE-INSTALL script failed


A quick `id vault` indeed fails to show the user id, namely because the port installation is reverted. So it seems that the port is entirely broken, unless maybe the user pre-creates the user/group so that the install script doesn't fail, perhaps.
